name: b200_8gpu_dgx
_comment: NVIDIA HGX/DGX B200 8-GPU server: same Blackwell B200 chip as GB200 NVL72 (192 GB HBM3E @ 8 TB/s, FP16 dense 2250 TFLOPS/GPU per framework convention; FP8 = 4500, FP4 = 9000 by linear byte scaling), NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction) per GPU. Single 8-GPU NVLink domain via 4 NVSwitch5 chips. B_agg = 8 × 900 GB/s = 7.2 TB/s single-dir system aggregate. Cross-node would be InfiniBand (CX7 ≈50 GB/s per port). Use this spec for production 8-GPU deployments (DGX B200 / HGX B200) instead of gb200.72gpu when modeling TP ≤ 8 — they share the same chip but differ in topology size beyond 8 GPUs.
